title: galeopsis × sulfurea
intro: Galeopsis × sulfurea, also known as yellow galeopsis or gold bugle, is a hybrid plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of galeopsis × sulfurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of galeopsis × sulfurea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
